description: 2D terrain probe game — binary search per row + cross-row inference
Sorted tile array with converging cursors, find pairs summing to target
Color gem row with draggable window edges, find minimum all-color window
Conveyor belt stack-sorting — DE=0.47 (forced path), drama=0.02 (monotonic progress)
Registry stamping for O(1) duplicate detection — strongest algorithm game metrics
Bracket matching with depth scoring — greedy-gap 4.6% (ordering doesn't matter)
Dungeon exploration with keys/locks — DFS with pruning
Sudoku board patrol — file each filled cell into row, column, and chamber ledgers instead of rescanning neighborhoods
Stake unsorted mile markers, then survey only true starts to find the longest consecutive ridge run
Noisy inscription audit — trim non-alphanumeric blockers at the live ends and compare normalized endpoints instead of rebuilding the whole string
Zero-balance treaty broker — fix one anchor, sweep the inner pair by sign, and keep the same anchor alive to catalog every unique 3Sum trio
Storm-battered shoreline sweep — keep the best basin seen so far and release only the wall that is limiting the waterline
Price-tape stock sweep — carry the cheapest buy anchor forward and compare each later day against it exactly once
One-pass radio band sweep — keep the longest clean signal by trimming left on echoes instead of restarting
Parade banner sweep — keep the longest stretch that can still be repainted into one emblem, and trim left only when the repair debt would exceed k
Cargo manifest sweep — expand until every required stamp is covered, then shave the left edge to secure the smallest valid satchel
Ceremonial clasp-route audit — pile open seals in one live vault, compare every closer to the current top, and fail the route the moment burial breaks the fit
Rotated ridge hunt — compare the middle beacon to the tail sentinel, and discard only the arc that cannot still hide the wrap break
Rotated relay-chain search — check mid first, then keep only the ordered half whose bounds can still contain the target
Convoy relinking — save the next car before swinging the current hitch backward, then advance the anchor and live handle together
Sorted siding merge — compare only the two live heads, couple the smaller one onto one departure tail, then stitch the untouched remainder in one splice
Two-speed buoy patrol — pulse the drifter one hop and the cutter two until escape proves open water or collision proves a loop
Garland reorder — pace slow/fast to the true cut, reverse the back strand safely, then lace one far lantern after each front lead
Dummy-dock towline — send one scout one extra link ahead from the dock, tow both hands together, then cut the next rope when the scout clears
Crown-ladder k-way merge — keep one live head from each sorted siding, dispatch the crowned smallest car, and refill only that lane before repairing through the lower child
Mirror-canopy traversal — swap the current branch hub, then finish one child subtree before crossing to the sibling side
Canopy height gauge — seal child branches first, then keep the larger child height plus one until the crown is certified
Twin-grove proof — compare paired crests in lockstep, finish both child lanes, then certify the parent only when both sides already came back safe
Graft hunt — test whether the full sprig fits at the current host branch, then search child branches before clearing the branch itself
Shared-fork canopy patrol — keep both target markers on one side until they split, then claim the first common branch without tracing both full routes
Canopy chorus queue — finish the live rail from the front, keep fresh children waiting in the next rail, and file one sheet per tree level
Live-charter BST audit — carry inherited floor and ceiling bounds down the canopy, seal legal branches, and catch hidden ancestor-bound breaches the moment they surface
Search-tree orchard harvest — keep the live return lane, ring blooms in inorder rank, and stop exactly when the kth branch lands
Dual-trace grove rebuild — seat the next preorder crest into the live inorder plot, then bank the right child card first so the left plot stays on top
Storm-bent canopy span audit — each branch sends up only one helpful child route, while the best full span may bend anywhere below the crown
Courier ribbon grove codec — stamp every live branch or hollow hook now, then bank the right child task first so the same preorder ribbon can regrow the tree
Dual-harbor median watch — keep the lower half under a max crown, the upper half under a min crown, and ferry only the exposed crown that restores the live split
Sorted cellar recipe search — keep one nondecreasing blend alive, reuse the current herb while it fits, then retreat one layer and continue from the next heavier shelf slot
Grid script search — keep one live adjacent trail for the target word, never reuse a tile on that trail, and peel back one step when the branch dies
Shared-stem archive — carve each opening once, seal true word endings, and answer exact-word or prefix warrants from the same branching vault
Veiled archive warrants — reuse shared stems, open one wildcard branch at a time, and backtrack only to the latest live veil until one sealed word survives
Shared-stem board harvest — keep one live board trail only while it still matches a trie prefix, bank short seals without resetting, and prune the branch the moment no listed word still fits
Storm-map island sweep — count fresh land once, then let one launch chart the whole orthogonally connected coast before the row scan continues
Mirror-hall graph walk — forge one echo per original beacon, then close every revisit wire onto that stored echo instead of duplicating the node
Dual-border tide chart — run one reverse flood from each ocean edge, climb only uphill or flat, and keep the basins both seas can still reach
Course-catalog peel — clear every zero-seal course, peel its outgoing locks, and if the ready rail empties before the catalog does, the leftovers form a cycle
Realm charter audit — bind only different clan crests, flag same-crest loop ropes, and certify the charter only if one clean realm remains
Alien shelf audit — compare adjacent words only, stop at the first split to forge one rune rule, reject longer-before-prefix breaches, and peel the zero-seal rail into an alphabet
Stair-route ribbon — seal each new stair exactly once from the two sealed stairs beneath it, and stop paying the exploding scout tax to recount routes from scratch
Quiet-haul prefix ledger — for each house, keep the better of the carried total or the current stash plus the sealed two-back total
Alarmed ring ledger — solve the two legal cuts of the circular street separately, then crown the larger finished quiet-haul total
Cipher-ribbon decode ledger — add every legal one-step and two-step lane, keep zeros alive only through valid pairs, and seal dead prefixes at 0
Exact-change amount ledger — test every denomination from smaller sealed totals, keep the cheapest predecessor-plus-one route, and mark unreachable totals as blocked
Signed forge strip — keep the best and worst product ending here because one negative multiplier can flip the live worst lane into the new best span
Center-heart ribbon — test every odd rune and even seam as a palindrome heart, pulse outward while mirrored pairs hold, and keep the longest certified span
Mirror-census ribbon — every rune already counts once; pulse each odd rune and even seam outward, adding one ledger mark per successful layer until every palindrome is counted
Cut-ledger ribbon — seal each endpoint only when one earlier live cut plus a listed word reaches it exactly, and mark the endpoint dead when every matching seam starts from dead ground
Ridge-marker endpoint ledger — seal each marker at 1 or one more than the strongest earlier lower badge, and crown the best sealed rise anywhere on the row
City route ledger — keep border plazas at 1, seal every interior plaza from north plus west, and abandon cheap direct surveys once the grid stops forgiving them
